comingSoon.heading: Journal y'ennimiro ekyakolebwa
comingSoon.body: Wandiika ekyabaddewo mu nnimiro — okusukkulirira, okumansira eddagala, okusiga, okukungula, n'okulambula — okusobola okutegeera obulungi chart za sensor n'okwekenneenya kwo. Ebiwandiiko bikwatagana n'omusiri, ne bikwata endaba ya sensor mu kiseera ky'ekikolwa, era bilabika ng'obubonero ku chart z'ebyafaayo byo.
comingSoon.captureBody: Ebikolwa mukaaga ebisembayo ku lupapula lw'okukwatako, okuwandiika nga otandika ku kika ky'ekyakozesebwa, n'olunyiriri olukakasa mu bigambo ebyangu buli lwoterekawo.
comingSoon.recordBody: Ebiwandiiko ebitegekeddwa obulungi era ebisomeka na makina, buli musiri nga birina ensibuko etakyuka — ebiwandiiko eby'obujjuvu ebikoleddwa ku lw'enkola ez'okugoberera amateeka mu biseera ebijja.
comingSoon.syncBody: Buli kiwandiiko kikulaga oba kiterekeddwa ku Gateway y'ennimiro oba nga kikyalindirira. Tewali kibula nga tokimanyiiko.

where.rangeMalformed: Ennamba z'emisiri ku siteegi si ntuufu.
where.rangeOutOfStation: Ennamba z'emisiri zirimu omusiri ogutali ku siteegi eno.
where.rangeDuplicate: Ennamba z'emisiri ku siteegi zirimu ennamba eddamu.
where.rangeNonInteger: Ennamba z'emisiri ku siteegi zirina okuba ennamba enzijuvu.
where.rangeNonPositive: Ennamba z'emisiri ku siteegi zirina okuba ezisinga ku ziro.
where.staleSelection: Okulonda kuno kukyusiddwa. Ddamu okutikka n'oddemu ogezeeko.

group.unavailableMembers: Abamu ku bali mu kibinja tebaliwo.
group.changedError: Ekibinja kino kikyuse. Ddamu otikke omuko era ogezeeko nate.

plot.name: Erinnya
plot.stale: Omusiri guno gukyusiddwa awalala. Guddemu okutikka nga tonnatereka.
plot.heterogeneousGroup: Omusiri guno guli mu kibinja kya layouts ezitakwatagana.

batch.duplicateBody: Kebera buli kiwandiiko ekiteeberezebwa okuba ekyiddiŋŋana nga tonnatereka bino eby'awamu.

unavailable.title: Journal tekiriwo
unavailable.body: Gateway eno tennaba kuba na journal y'ennimiro. Zzaawo firmware ya Gateway okugisobozesa.

table.heading: Ebiwandiiko bya Journal
table.empty: Tewali biwandiiko bikwatagana ne filters ezaakolebwa kaakano.
table.scopeNotNarrowed: Ebiwandiiko by'emisiri gyonna bye birabika. Okusengejja olukalala n'ebifulumizibwa okusinziira ku siteegi oba ekibinja tekinnayinzika kaakano.

detail.heading: Ebikwata ku kiwandiiko
detail.placeholder: Londa ekiwandiiko okulaba ebikwata ku kyo.
detail.notFound: Ekiwandiiko kino tekizuuliddwa. Kiyinza okuba nga kikyusiddwa oba kiggiddwawo mu kifo ekirala.

locked.draft: Ekiwandiiko kino kitannamala. Kiddiremu okuva mu lukalala lw'ebitannamala okukola enkyukakyuka.
locked.voided: Ekiwandiiko kino kisaziddwamu era tekisobola kukyusibwa.

context.heading: Embeera za sensor mu kiseera ekyo
context.empty: Tewali mbeera za sensor ezaakwatiddwa ku kiwandiiko kino.

correction.heading: Longoosa ekiwandiiko kino
correction.unavailable: Fomu y'ekiwandiiko kino teri kyaliwo, n'olwekyo tekisobola kulongoosebwa wano.
correction.stale: Ekiwandiiko kino kikyusiddwa mu kifo ekirala. Kiddemu okutikka nga tonnalongoosa nate.

void.reasonRequired: Yingiza ensonga nga tonnasaza kiwandiiko kino.
void.stale: Ekiwandiiko kino kikyusiddwa mu kifo ekirala. Kiddemu okutikka nga tonnaddamu kukisaza.
void.error: Twayisiddwa okusaza ekiwandiiko kino. Gezaako nate.

drafts.title: Ebitannamala ebyetaaga okumalirizibwa
drafts.discardError: Twayisiddwa okusuula ekitannamala kino. Gezaako nate.
drafts.completeError: Twayisiddwa okumaliriza ekitannamala kino. Gezaako nate.
drafts.completeStale: Ekitannamala kino kikyusiddwa mu kifo ekirala. Kiddemu okutikka nga tonnamaliriza nate.

stale.body: Birabika ebitannamala ebisembayo ebimanyiddwa — okuddaabiriza kugaanye.

picker.title: Kyabaddewo ki?
picker.unsupported: Ekikolwa kino tekiriwo ku layout gy'olonze

validation.incompatibleUnit: Ekipimo kino tekisobola kukozesebwa ku muwendo guno
validation.crossBasis: Ekipimo kino kikozesa enkola endala ey'okupima
validation.layoutTemplateMismatch: Obungi buno obw'ebikwata tebukolera ku layout gy'olonze
validation.cropRequired: Yingiza ekirime kubanga tewali kiseera kikola ku musiri guno
validation.invalidLocalTime: Yingiza ennaku n'ekiseera ebituufu eby'omu kitundu
validation.nonexistentLocalTime: Ekiseera kino eky'omu kitundu tekiriwo kubanga essaawa yeeyongera mu maaso
validation.ambiguousLocalTime: Ekiseera kino eky'omu kitundu kibaawo emirundi ebiri kubanga essaawa edda emabega
validation.invalidUtcOffset: UTC offset gy'olonze tekwataganye n'ekiseera kino eky'omu kitundu

carry.prefilled: Kikoppeddwa okuva mu kiwandiiko ekisembayo ekikwataganye
carry.repeatTreatmentDescription: Kebera ekyakozesebwa ekyasooka nga tonnakoppa bifo byakyo ebikuumibwa
carry.invalidated: Ekyakozesebwa ekyasooka tekikyakwatagana na musiri guno, ekirime kino, akaseera kano, ebbanga lino ery'okulima, oba layout eno

confirm.title: Kebera nga tonnaterekawo
confirm.duplicateBody: Kebera ekiwandiiko ekiriwo nga tonnaterekawo ekirala

transition.title: Kebera emiwendo egikyusiddwa
transition.body: Enkyukakyuka mu layout ekwata ku miwendo gy'oyingiza dda. Londa ky'oyagala okukola ku buli guumu nga tonnagenda mu maaso.
transition.reasonChoiceInvalid: Omuwendo guno tekukkirizibwa mu layout empya.
transition.pendingBanner: Emiwendo emirala geetaaga okusalawo kwo nga tonnagenda mu maaso.

save.cloudWaiting: Kiterekeddwa ku OSI Server — kirindiridde Gateway y'ennimiro
save.lossWarning: Enkyukakyuka zikwatiddwa mu lupapula luno lwokka okutuusa Gateway lw'ezitereka
save.leaveWarning: Bw'ovaawo kati, enkyukakyuka Gateway ze zitanaba kutereka zijja kubulwa
